summary: Admin SaaS Metrics Dashboard and button label fixes testing completed. All features working correctly. Backend API returns all required metrics (MRR, ARR, active_subscribers, trial_users, churn_rate, plan_breakdown as array, mrr_history as array). Frontend displays all metrics cards correctly. Button labels fixed ('Créer la facture', 'Créer le devis'). UpgradeModal redirects to /facturation. Admin menu shows 'Métriques SaaS' link.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/metrics returns all required fields: mrr, arr, active_subscribers, trial_users, churn_rate, plan_breakdown (array), mrr_history (array)
Admin metrics endpoint correctly requires super_admin role (returns 401 without auth)
AdminMetricsPage displays all metric cards: MRR, ARR, Abonnés actifs, Churn Rate, Utilisateurs en essai, Comptes expirés, Nouveaux ce mois
Plan breakdown shows distribution by plan with MRR contribution
MRR history chart shows 6 months of data
Invoice form button correctly shows 'Créer la facture' (not 'Créateur')
Quote form button correctly shows 'Créer le devis'
UpgradeModal component redirects to /facturation (verified in code)
UsageCounter component redirects to /tarifs (pricing page) - correct behavior for browsing plans
Admin navigation includes 'Métriques SaaS' link under ADMINISTRATION section
Dashboard shows UsageCounter with trial days remaining and usage stats (1/9 devis, 0/9 factures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin SaaS Metrics Dashboard fully implemented and tested. Endpoint /api/admin/metrics returns MRR, ARR, active_subscribers, trial_users, churn_rate, plan_breakdown (array), mrr_history (array). Admin page at /admin/metrics displays all metrics. Button labels fixed. UpgradeModal redirects to /facturation. Stripe checkout is MOCKED with test key sk_test_emergent.

GET /api/admin/metrics returns all requi.details: Returns mrr, arr, active_subscribers, trial_users, churn_rate, plan_breakdown (array), mrr_history (array)

Admin metrics page /admin/metrics displa.details: Shows MRR, ARR, Abonnés actifs, Churn Rate, Utilisateurs en essai, Comptes expirés, Nouveaux ce mois, Plan breakdown, MRR history

UpgradeModal redirects to /facturation.details: Code verified: navigate('/facturation') on line 51 of UpgradeModal.jsx

Menu shows 'Métriques SaaS' link for adm.details: Link visible in sidebar under ADMINISTRATION section for super_admin users

Dashboard shows UsageCounter with trial.details: Shows 'Utilisation ce mois' with Devis utilisés (1/9) and Factures utilisées (0/9)

mocked_apis_list: Stripe test mode with key sk_test_emergent
mocked_apis.note: Stripe checkout will fail with test key - need real Stripe API key for production

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as implemented
